fn choose() { match x { left => a, right => b } }
---
Fn(name="choose", body=Match(scrutinee=Variable("x"), arms=[left => Variable("a"), right => Variable("b")]))
==========
fn pick() { match a { x => x } }
---
Fn(name="pick", body=Match(scrutinee=Variable("a"), arms=[x => Variable("x")]))
==========
fn pick2() { match a { .some(let x) => x, .none => a } }
---
Fn(name="pick2", body=Match(scrutinee=Variable("a"), arms=[. some ( let x ) => Variable("x"), . none => Variable("a")]))
